3055630.name: Retro Pistol Hero
3055630.description:
Welcome to Retro Pistol Hero - an FPS shooter in retro pixel style with procedurally generated locations. The player's task is to clear an unknown office-like space from purple crystal enemies. The game is very challenging and dynamic.

Step into the shoes of a fearless hero armed with nothing but your trusty retro pistol, and dive into infinity levels filled with hordes of purple crystal enemies. With each room presenting a new challenge, your reflexes and accuracy will be put to the test as you fight your way through the relentless onslaught.

Game Features:

- Retro pixel art style
- Intense FPS action
- Procedurally generated locations
- Challenging difficulty
